title: Internal Mobility & Promotion Velocity Analytics (Talent Marketplace, Career Pathing, Tenure-to-Promotion, Lateral Movement)
dataSources: Primary telemetry lands in **`index=hris_secure`** after transforms mint **`employee_id_hash`**. **`workday:talent_marketplace_application`** rows originate from HTTPS collectors polling `/ccx/api/v1/{tenant}/talentMarketplace/applications` plus REST **`/talentMarketplace/postings`** metadata blended with Career Hub snapshots referencing **`Career_Goals_Reference`** and **`Internal_Career_History_Reference`** returned via **`Get_Worker_Career_Information`** SOAP or **`/workers/{wid}/careerProfile`** REST when Integration System Users authorize Worker domains. **`workday:internal_job_application`** captures **`internal_only`** applicants tied to **`jobRequisitions/{id}`** flags for fills counted toward **`internal_fill_pct`**. **`workday:promotion_event`** and **`workday:succession_plan_update`** expose **`Promotion_Date`**, **`Succession_Readiness`**, **`Ready_Now`** tiers feeding succession coverage ratios alongside **`promotion_velocity`** math. **`successfactors:cdp_event`** rows arrive through OData **`CareerDevelopmentPlan`**, **`DevelopmentObjective`**, **`MentoringProgram`**, **`CareerWorksheet`**, **`CareerOpportunityForApplicant`** pulls aligned with Workforce Analytics snapshots. **`eightfold:career_path_event`** carries **`eightfold.career_path.match_score`** outputs from Eightfold trajectory modeling while **`gloat:opportunity_match`** exposes **`gloat.opportunity.match_score`** plus Beamery-era **`/v2/projects`** payloads where tenants migrated APIs in 2024. **`fuel50:role_application`** and **`cornerstone:internal_job_event`** optionally augment Fuel50 / Cornerstone Career Center ladders when enterprises split mobility tooling. **`mentorcliq:pairing_event`** (plus **`together:match_event`** or **`chronus:program_event`** substitutes) expresses mentorship throughput distinct from LMS completions. Stretch gig telemetry optionally stitches **`jira:gig_membership`** hours into **`stretch_assignment_hours`**. Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) JDBC extracts duplicate SaaS feeds into Snowflake warehouses when nightly **`Worker_Career_Movement`** reconciliations lag REST freshness.
app: Custom modular-input suite or Workday Studio exporters pushing JSON into Splunk HTTP Event Collector receivers documented under Splunk official data-ingestion guides; Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) for JDBC-backed **`Promotion_History`** replicas; optional Splunk Add-on Builder pipelines wrapping SAP OData throttling logic; KV Store collections backing **`promotion_rate_controls.lookup`** seeded from calibration spreadsheets plus Mercer timeline commentary anchors.
spl:
index=hris_secure (sourcetype="workday:talent_marketplace_application" OR sourcetype="workday:internal_job_application" OR sourcetype="workday:promotion_event" OR sourcetype="workday:succession_plan_update" OR sourcetype="successfactors:cdp_event" OR sourcetype="eightfold:career_path_event" OR sourcetype="gloat:opportunity_match" OR sourcetype="mentorcliq:pairing_event") earliest=-395d@d latest=now
| fields - employee_id Worker_ID PersonIdExternal candidate_email raw_ssn bank_account telephone
| eval employee_id_hash=tostring(coalesce(employee_id_hash,sha256(tostring(coalesce(worker_ref,person_id_external,user_id,person_number,"MISSING")))))
| eval wd_goal=coalesce('workday.worker.career_profile.career_goal',career_goal)
| eval sf_target=coalesce('successfactors.cdp.development_objective.target_role',development_target_role)
| eval ef_score=tonumber(coalesce('eightfold.career_path.match_score',path_score,"0"))
| eval gloat_score=tonumber(coalesce('gloat.opportunity.match_score',opp_fit,"0"))
| eval job_family=coalesce(Job_Family_Reference,job_family,sf_target,"UNKNOWN")
| eval perf_rating=coalesce(performance_rating,Performance_Rating,"UNSCORED")
| eval cohort_demo=coalesce(reporting_demo_bucket,demographic_segment,"AGG_OTHER")
| eval hire_epoch=strptime(coalesce(hire_date,Hire_Date),"%Y-%m-%d")
| eval promo_epoch=strptime(coalesce(promotion_effective_date,Promotion_Date),"%Y-%m-%d")
| eval months_to_promo=if(isnotnull(hire_epoch) AND isnotnull(promo_epoch),round((promo_epoch-hire_epoch)/(86400*30.44),2),null())
| eval first_promo_marker=if(tostring(is_first_promotion) IN ("1","true","TRUE","Y","Yes"),1,0)
| eval cat=case(sourcetype="workday:promotion_event","PROMO",sourcetype="workday:succession_plan_update","SUCC",sourcetype="workday:talent_marketplace_application","TMP_APP",sourcetype="workday:internal_job_application","IJ_APP",like(sourcetype,"successfactors%"),"SF_CDP",like(sourcetype,"eightfold%"),"EF",like(sourcetype,"gloat%"),"GL",like(sourcetype,"mentorcliq%"),"MN","OTH")
| eval internal_hire=if(cat=="IJ_APP" AND match(lower(tostring(application_outcome)),"hired|accepted"),1,0)
| eval external_hire=if(match(lower(tostring(hire_channel)),"external|agency"),1,0)
| eval lateral_move=if(match(lower(tostring(role_change_class)),"lateral|horizontal|matrix|transfer"),1,0)
| eval promotion_evt=if(cat=="PROMO",1,0)
| eval mentor_evt=if(cat=="MN",1,0)
| eval stretch_hours=tonumber(coalesce(stretch_assignment_hours,"0"))
| bucket _time span=1mon
| stats sum(internal_hire) as int_h sum(external_hire) as ext_h sum(lateral_move) as lat sum(promotion_evt) as prm sum(mentor_evt) as mnt dc(eval(if(cat=="TMP_APP",employee_id_hash,null()))) as tmp_app avg(ef_score) as a_ef avg(gloat_score) as a_gl median(eval(if(promotion_evt==1 AND first_promo_marker==1,months_to_promo,null()))) as med_m1 perc95(eval(if(promotion_evt==1,months_to_promo,null()))) as p95m sum(stretch_hours) as st_h by job_family cohort_demo perf_rating _time
| eval fill_pct=round(100*int_h/nullif(int_h+ext_h,0),2)
| eval lat_prm=round(lat/nullif(prm,0),2)
| eval vel=round((tmp_app+mnt)/nullif(int_h+ext_h+prm,0),3)
| where int_h+ext_h>=5 OR prm>=5 OR lat>=5 OR tmp_app>=5
| lookup promotion_rate_controls cohort_demo perf_rating OUTPUT floor_rate
| eval impact_flag=if(isnotnull(floor_rate) AND prm<floor_rate,"review_four_fifths",null())
| table _time job_family cohort_demo perf_rating fill_pct lat_prm med_m1 p95m tmp_app mnt st_h vel a_ef a_gl impact_flag
description: Correlates Workday Talent Marketplace applications, internal-only hires, Career Hub mobility milestones, SAP SuccessFactors Career Development Planning objectives, Eightfold trajectory scores, Gloat marketplace matches, MentorcliQ pairing throughput, and succession-plan snapshots â€” after hashing identifiers â€” to expose rolling twelve-month internal-fill percentages, lateral-move versus promotion mixes tuned against HiPo benchmarks, median months-to-first-promotion stratified by job family and calibrated performance slices, mentorship-plus-marketplace velocity, stretch-assignment hours, and ethics-reviewed adverse-impact monitors keyed off **`promotion_rate_controls`** lookups tied to **`performance_rating`** strata rather than headline demographics alone.
value: Workforce presidents and CFO peers cite Mercer Global Talent Trends plus SHRM benchmarks contrasting internal versus external hire economics â€” roughly fifty-one percent savings when internal **`cost-per-fill`** narratives accompany succession-ready benches â€” while boards demand proof that AI-skills marketplaces (Eightfold, Gloat, Fuel50 adoption curves referencing Deloitte urgency statistics) shorten promotion latency versus letting Finance bleed unnecessary recruiter retainers on redundant external pipelines; tying Splunk aggregates to **`successionPools`** readiness feeds protects revenue-critical roles before Heidrick-style readiness gaps strand CFO narratives mid-cycle.
implementation: (1) Provision **`employee_id_hash`** transforms plus **`hris_secure`** RBAC macros restricting analysts to aggregated SPL outputs with **`cohort_floor_five`** suppression; (2) onboard Marketplace REST plus SAP OData connectors before overlaying mentorship feeds so numerator discipline (`internal_fill_pct`) stays aligned with Finance-approved definitions; (3) seed **`promotion_rate_controls`** KV lookups after calibration cycles noting **`performance_rating`** stratification requirements for **`impact_flag`** screening; (4) schedule monthly Dashboard Studio refreshes with quarterly ethics reviews referencing **`four_fifths`** narratives tied to Uniform Guidelines commentary; (5) sync succession readiness extracts nightly so **`succession_plan_update`** watchers reconcile **`prm`** spikes versus readiness theatrics.
visualization: Dashboard Studio trellis **`splunk.column`** panels contrasting **`fill_pct`** versus thirty-percent crisis thresholds plus fifty-percent strengths; **`splunk.line`** overlays plotting **`lat_prm`** against HiPo three-to-one guardrails; **`splunk.scatter`** plotting **`tmp_app`** velocity versus **`prm`** colored by **`perf_rating`**; **`splunk.singlevalue`** widgets marking mentorship throughput (**`mnt`**) versus Fuel50 adoption proxies; annotated Markdown tiles citing Mercer SaaS (**twenty-one months**) versus FinServ (**twenty-eight months**) anchors without implying Splunk computes statutory burdens.

references.title: Splunk â€” Use the HTTP Event Collector
SAP Help Portal â€” SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central OData overview
U.S. EEOC â€” Enforcement Guidance on Disparate Impact Under Title VII
Mercer â€” Global Talent Trends hub
SHRM â€” Talent acquisition benchmarking references
SAP Help Portal â€” SAP SuccessFactors Learning

knownFalsePositives: Large-scale Workday **`job_family`** remap initiatives temporarily inflate **`lat_prm`** because lateral postings absorb renamed ladders before promotions catch up â€” reconcile effective-dated **`Job_Family_Reference`** histories before accusing Talent Marketplace stagnation. Finance-funded interim gig assignments spike **`stretch_assignment_hours`** without altering **`prm`**, mimicking mobility vibrancy though succession benches remain hollow â€” cross-reference **`stretch_assignment_hours`** approvals flagged **`succession_critical`** versus exploratory rotations. Eightfold **`path_score`** dips whenever **`skills_inference_refresh`** rebuilds taxonomy nodes overnight so **`avg_ef_score`** swoons absent behavioural change â€” annotate dashboards whenever **`skills_cloud_version`** increments. SAP **`CareerDevelopmentPlan`** OData retries duplicate **`SF_CDP`** rows inflating mentorship-ready narratives despite stagnant pairing chemistry â€” dedupe via **`etag`** hashes plus **`changed_on`** timestamps from BizX exports. Campus-heavy cohorts exhibit elongated **`med_m1`** simply because rotational programs postpone promotions versus seasoned hires â€” isolate **`hire_program`** markers before benchmarking Mercer SaaS timelines. Collective bargaining mandates posting union roles externally even when filled internally, depressing naive **`fill_pct`** readings unless **`union_notice`** booleans suppress denominators tied to **`job_profile_union`** lookups. Executive **`succession_plan_update`** snapshots replay unchanged **`Ready_Now`** tiers nightly, implying churn in **`prm`** counters despite frozen nominations â€” collapse duplicates via **`snapshot_seq`** keys supplied by SAP Integration Center extracts.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
â€˘ Splunk Enterprise **9.2+** or **Splunk_Cloud** search tier with **HTTPS** egress from collecting hosts to vendor endpoints plus **8088/tcp** to Splunk HTTP Event Collector receivers documented under Splunk official ingestion guides.
â€˘ A restricted index **hris_secure** (or rename consistently across SPL and RBAC) whose roles grant **srchIndexesAllowed** only to HR-analytics stewards â€” promotion throughput touches regulated HR analytics.
â€˘ Index-time hashing transforms mapping plaintext identifiers to **employee_id_hash** before events reach analysts; forbid interactive drilldown to raw Worker identifiers except inside break-glass roles.
â€˘ Python **3.9+** modular-input workers or Workday Studio flows exporting JSON rows into **Splunk_HEC** at fifteen-to-sixty minute cadences depending on tenant volume caps described later.
â€˘ Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) optional JDBC lanes mirroring warehouse projections when SaaS pulls lag nightly payroll merges.
â€˘ KV collections backing **KV_lookup_promotion_controls** for calibrated floors sourced from workforce-planning ethics reviews plus Mercer SaaS versus FinServ timeline benchmarks referenced qualitatively in dashboards.

**Step 1 â€” Configure mobility telemetry ingestion**
Path A (**Workday_RaaS** plus REST): Publish mobility extracts hitting paths such as `/ccx/service/customreport2/{tenant}/{owner}/Promotion_History` plus REST pulls toward `/ccx/api/v1/{tenant}/talentMarketplace/applications` and `/ccx/api/v1/{tenant}/jobApplications` filtered by **Integration_System_User**. Emit sourcetypes **`workday:talent_marketplace_application`**, **`workday:internal_job_application`**, **`workday:promotion_event`**, **`workday:succession_plan_update`** with SOAP parity fields (`Career_Goals_Reference`, `Internal_Career_History_Reference`) when Career Hub snapshots complement Marketplace throughput.
Path B (**SAP SuccessFactors OData v2**): Poll `/odata/v2/CareerDevelopmentPlan`, `/odata/v2/MentoringProgram`, `/odata/v2/CareerWorksheet`, `/odata/v2/CareerOpportunityForApplicant` delivering **`successfactors:cdp_event`** payloads carrying **SF_OData_CDP** lineage references aligned to Employee Central job-history joins.
Path C (**Eightfold / Gloat / Fuel50 connectors**): Ship **`eightfold:career_path_event`**, **`gloat:opportunity_match`**, **`fuel50:career_path_event`** JSON containing trajectory scores alongside **`mentorcliq:pairing_event`** schedules â€” throttle pagination after HTTP **429** responses and jitter retries.
Path D (**Stretch roster bridges**): Optional Jira / Asana extracts tagging gig memberships append **`stretch_assignment_hours`** without importing ticket bodies.
Parsing stance: configure **`props.conf`** `KV_MODE=json` for REST collectors; anchor `_time` on HR-effective timestamps (`promotion_effective_date`) rather than Splunk indexing latency.

**Step 2 â€” Author schedules, lookups, and SPL**
Paste the SPL locked in the JSON **`spl`** field â€” it unions mobility sourcetypes, hashes identifiers, lifts dotted vendor logical fields (`workday.worker.career_profile.career_goal`, `successfactors.cdp.development_objective.target_role`, `eightfold.career_path.match_score`, `gloat.opportunity.match_score`), derives monthly cohort ratios (**internal_fill_pct**, **lat_prm**, mentorship velocity **vel**, median months-to-first-promotion **med_m1**), and compares promotions versus calibrated floors via **`promotion_rate_controls`** lookups tied to **Talent_Marketplace_REST** slices.
Schedule monthly Dashboard Studio refreshes plus conditional alerts when **`fill_pct`** stays below thirty percent two consecutive months or **`impact_flag`** surfaces **`review_four_fifths`** patterns once ethics-approved denominators populate the lookup.

**Step 3 â€” Validate**
Compare **`fill_pct`** totals against Workday Talent Marketplace dashboards counting hires flagged **`internal_only_flag`** versus agency fills.
Cross-check **`med_m1`** versus Mercer-published SaaS eighteen-to-twenty-four month versus FinServ twenty-four-to-thirty-six month narrative bands annotated outside Splunk if HR picks midpoint guards.
Reconcile **`tmp_app`** applicant counts against Marketplace funnel widgets â€” mismatches typically trace duplicate Integration_System_User reruns replaying `/applications` JSON.
Validate **`promotion_rate_controls`** joins against calibration spreadsheets noting **`performance_calibration_slice`** anchors.

**Step 4 â€” Operationalize**
Dashboard Studio layout: trellis **`splunk.column`** panels on **`fill_pct`** per **`job_family`**, **`splunk.line`** overlays comparing **`lat_prm`** against HiPo healthy three-to-one benchmarks cited from Mercer narratives, **`splunk.singlevalue`** widgets tracking mentorship **`mnt`** throughput plus Fuel50 adoption proxies.
Alert routing: mobility downturn signals route to Talent Marketplace owners plus **`successionPools`** planners; **`impact_flag`** routes exclusively through Employee Relations counsel workflows referencing **four_fifths_screen** interpretations aligned with **EEOC** Uniform Guidelines narratives.

**Step 5 â€” Troubleshooting scenarios**
â€˘ OAuth rotation drift â€” Expired Marketplace OAuth tokens yield HTTP **401** responses yet modular inputs sometimes classify them as successes â€” inspect ExecProcessor stderr plus vendor **`WWW-Authenticate`** headers.
â€˘ Sandbox tenant bleed-through â€” `wd*-impl-services1.workday.com` payloads accidentally indexed beside production widen **`fill_pct`** artificially until hostname gates tighten.
â€˘ Duplicate Marketplace submissions â€” Applicants spamming **`TMP_APP`** reopen clicks inflate **`tmp_app`** without recruiter progression â€” dedupe via composite keys `(employee_id_hash,posting_id)`.
â€˘ Promotion backfills â€” Retro payroll corrections rewrite **`Promotion_Date`** months backward so **`months_to_promo`** swings negative â€” clamp with HR-approved posting versus payroll reconciliation macros.
â€˘ Calibration suppression â€” Teams withholding **`performance_rating`** collapse **`perf_rating`** to **`UNSCORED`** buckets hiding **`impact_flag`** sensitivity until calibration closes.
â€˘ Eightfold latency â€” **`ef_score`** arrives nightly while Workday promotions stream hourly â€” blended **`vel`** dips though mobility remains healthy; stagger `_time` alignment.
â€˘ Gloat Beamery hybrid payloads â€” Post-acquisition **`gloat_score`** schemas bifurcate between `/v1` and `/v2` arrays â€” unify via **`spath`** transforms before **`avg`** calculations.
â€˘ MentorcliQ churn â€” Program cancellations replay **`mentor_evt`** spikes absent mentoring chemistry â€” verify **`program_status`** enumerations.
â€˘ SAP OData throttle â€” **429** bursts during **`CareerDevelopmentPlan`** pulls skip CDP slices leaving **`SF_CDP`** silent â€” widen `$skip` pagination windows.
â€˘ Cornerstone overlaps â€” **Cornerstone_CareerCenter** internal postings duplicated inside Workday Marketplace double-count **`internal_hire`** unless **`req_system_of_record`** tagging wins.
â€˘ Warehouse drift â€” DB Connect JDBC snapshots stale versus REST streams lag KPI deltas until **`last_modified`** watermarks advance.
â€˘ Stretch-hour inflation â€” Volunteer gigs unrelated to sanctioned **`stretch_assignment_hours`** inflate **`st_h`** â€” enforce **`approved_by_hrbp`** booleans upstream.
â€˘ Demographic granularity â€” Thin **`cohort_demo`** strata violate **`cohort_floor_five`** â€” collapse segments via automated macros.
â€˘ Succession duplication â€” **`succession_plan_update`** nightly snapshots replay unchanged readiness tiers creating phantom **`prm`** deltas unless **`snapshot_seq`** dedupes.
â€˘ Skills inference noise â€” Eightfold **`path_score`** dips after taxonomy refreshes unrelated to mobility velocity â€” annotate dashboards when **`skills_cloud_version`** increments.


**Benchmark overlays (qualitative storytelling only)**
Splunk charts narrate mobility posture alongside external reports â€” never replace counsel-led adverse-impact math. Mercer_top_quartile_internal_fill narratives frequently cite fifty-percent-plus internal fills versus thirty-percent bottoms when CHRO decks defend Marketplace funding; annotate Markdown footers rather than embedding copyrighted figures. Gartner_program_penetration commentary references roughly one-third of employers running formal mobility programs while forty-nine-percent regretted-attrition deltas remain anecdotal literature tied to vendor surveys â€” cite slides externally. Deloitte_skills_marketplace_urgency statistics describe forty-seven-percent urgency versus eighteen-percent historical baselines when boards ask why Fuel50 suddenly appears in procurement queues. LinkedIn_learning_promotion_months anecdotes contrast sixteen-month medians at heavy-learning cultures versus twenty-two-month industry medians â€” pair Splunk med_m1 tiles with disclaimers because LinkedIn datasets differ from your tenant. Josh_Bersin_reskill_cycle mentions thirty-percent reskilling every three years versus five years pre-pandemic when explaining Eightfold inference churn. SHRM_cost_delta storytelling contrasts forty-two-hundred-dollar internal fills versus eighty-five-hundred-dollar external fills â€” validate finance figures before engraving thresholds into alerts. Heidrick_ready_now_gap narratives cite thirty-five-percent Fortune five-hundred readiness for critical roles when succession_updates lag â€” separate Splunk counts from board slides via watermark macros. Ravin_jobs_as_tasks_mix framing reminds executives that sixty-percent task decomposition ties to mobility elasticity â€” helpful context when lat_prm climbs because gigs substitute promotions. Each overlay syncs with Splunk_dashboard_tokens so executives flip benchmark commentary without exporting underlying employee_id_hash lists.
Governance anchor 1: talent_grid_alignment.
Governance anchor 2: succession_coverage_gap.
Governance anchor 3: Fuel50_role_marketplace.
Governance anchor 4: LinkedIn_learning_anchor.
Governance anchor 5: SHRM_cost_per_internal_hire.
Governance anchor 6: LinkedIn_engagement_lift.
Governance anchor 7: Heidrick_ready_now_gap.
Governance anchor 8: role_versatility_signal.
Governance anchor 9: career_framework_completion_pct.
Governance anchor 10: stretch_assignment_throughput.
grandmaExplanation: We notice how often coworkers browse internal openings, how long someone waits before their first step up, whether sideways moves outnumber promotions in healthy proportions, and whether leaders mostly lift people already inside rather than importing strangers at every turn. That plain scorecard tells executives if posted career ladders truly move people or only decorate slideshows.
